title: [InstCombine] Reassociate commutative binops over select/phi/minmax
author: MitchBriles
description:
Fixes #187057

See alive2 test cases: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/DvR-oV. Tests with larger bit widths and without "--disable-undef-input" were verified locally. Nits appreciated.

cc @dtcxzyw

tests.test_body:
define i32 @sadd_min_max_assoc_comm(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
  %min = call i32 @llvm.smin.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  %rhs = add i32 %z, %min
  %max = call i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  %ret = add i32 %max, %rhs
  ret i32 %ret
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32, i32) #0

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.smin.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

  %min = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  %lhs = add i32 %z, %min
  %max = call i32 @llvm.umax.i32(i32 %x, i32 %y)
  %ret = add i32 %lhs, %max
  ret i32 %ret
}

comments.author: MitchBriles
comments.body: This currently only handles `(A op B) op C` where `B op C` is a "symmetric pair." Could we move the logic for matching these pairs to InstSimplify so that InstCombine can do this more generally? @dtcxzyw @nikic

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:
> Could we move the logic for matching these pairs to InstSimplify so that InstCombine can do this more generally

Sorry I don't get your point. `matchSymmetricPair(A, B)` only shows that `A op B` can be simplified, but it still needs to create new instructions rather than being folded into an existing value.

comments.author: MitchBriles
MitchBriles
comments.body:
> The commuted pattern should be covered

Right, that's what I mean when talking about the generality of this patch. It's not very clean to do each of these patterns individually. What do you think about this? https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/187493#issuecomment-4207618493

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:
> > The commuted pattern should be covered
> 
> Right, that's what I mean when talking about the generality of this patch. It's not very clean to do each of these patterns individually.

We have to duplicate the logic in SimplifyAssociativeOrCommutative.

> What do you think about this? [#187493 (comment)](https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/187493#issuecomment-4207618493)

Modifying flags/operands is also treated as creating a new instruction. Only those transformations that can be done in a single RAUW are suitable for InstSimplify.
